scripts.refresh: set -a; [ -f .env.local ] && . ./.env.local; set +a; if [ -z "$VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL" ]; then echo 'Error: VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL not set. Paste it into .env.local — it lives in Vercel project settings as Sensitive, so vercel env pull leaves it empty.'; exit 1; fi; curl -fsSL -X POST "$VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL" && echo '\nDeploy triggered. Vercel will purge the CDN when the build finishes (~30s).'
